name: tqx-tools
description: TwinQX / XISOM design and HTML tooling for Claude Code.

plugins.name: tqx-preview-html
plugins.description: TwinQX Terracotta Atlas single-file HTML page builder (landing pages, brand previews, SCADA dashboard mocks).

plugins.name: tqx-ccusage
plugins.description: Report Claude Code token usage and cost per model by daily / weekly / monthly / session / billing-block mode via the ccusage CLI (auto-installs if missing, then summarizes).

plugins.name: tqx-diagram-excalidraw
plugins.description: Create Excalidraw diagrams that argue visually, styled in the TwinQX Terracotta Atlas brand (warm Hỏa-Thổ palette, no green/blue). Includes a Playwright render pipeline for visual validation.
